title: lantana depressa var. floridana
intro: Lantana depressa var. floridana, also known as the dwarf buttonbush, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Florida. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, thanks to its ability to produce compounds with antibacterial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Lantana depressa var. floridana, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
